args.code: (async () => { const out = {at:new Date().toISOString()}; if (typeof window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_RESET_PIPELINE_LOCK__ === "function") out.reset = window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_RESET_PIPELINE_LOCK__("single_field_5min_run"); const fields = ["brand","use","feature","function","material","origin","high_concerned_chemical"]; out.before = await window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_READONLY_PREFLIGHT__(); out.results = []; for (const field of fields) { const started = Date.now(); const beforeStatus = await window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_READONLY_PREFLIGHT__(); const missing = beforeStatus.preflight?.requiredAttributes?.missing || []; const unsafe = beforeStatus.preflight?.unsafeRequiredAttributeDisplays || []; const need = missing.includes(field) || missing.some(x => String(x).toLowerCase().includes(field.replace(/_/g, " "))) || unsafe.some(x => String(x).toLowerCase().includes(field.replace(/_/g, " "))); if (!need && beforeStatus.preflight?.requiredAttributes?.ok) { out.results.push({field, skipped:true, reason:"already-ok"}); continue; } const deadlineAt = Date.now() + 5000; let r; try { r = await window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_REQUIRED_ATTR_FIELD_ONLY__({manual:true, fieldId:field, deadlineAt}); } catch (e) { r = {ok:false, error:String(e && e.message || e)}; } const afterStatus = await window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_READONLY_PREFLIGHT__(); const readback = (afterStatus.preflight?.requiredAttributes?.fields || []).find(x => x && x.id === field); out.results.push({field, elapsedMs:Date.now()-started, result:r && {ok:r.field?.ok ?? r.ok, timedOut:r.field?.timedOut || r.timedOut, reason:r.field?.reason || r.reason || r.error || "", selectedText:r.field?.selectedText || "", mode:r.field?.mode || r.mode || ""}, readback, remainingMissing: afterStatus.preflight?.requiredAttributes?.missing || [], unsafe: afterStatus.preflight?.unsafeRequiredAttributeDisplays || []}); if ((r && (r.timedOut || r.field?.timedOut)) || Date.now() - started > 9000) break; } out.after = await window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_READONLY_PREFLIGHT__(); return JSON.stringify(out); })()
